<!--
  Thanks for contributing to the Clay documentation PoC.
  Please answer the questions below so review is fast. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the
  content rules (Learn tone, plain CommonMark, no em dashes, Storybook links for
  examples).
-->

## Which page did you change?

<!-- For example: docs/components/button.md -->

## Did you check the change against the source?

<!-- Answer yes or no. Sources are clayui.com for implementation and Lexicon for
     design intent. -->

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

## Does the change keep the content as plain CommonMark?

<!-- Answer yes or no. No MDX, no framework components, no HTML beyond what is
     unavoidable, no shortcodes. GFM tables are allowed only inside the generated
     API blocks. Did not hand-edit anything between API:START and API:END. -->

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

## Notes

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know. -->
